subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #004 Abraham
subcodes.first_line: Among those who possessed this divine power and were assisted by it was Abraham.
subcodes.first_line_orig: دارندهء این قوه و مؤید این قوه از جمله حضرت ابراهیم بود و برهان بر این
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael
